'''''Ewoks'' 5''' is the fifth issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books and was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[October 1]], [[1985]] with a cover date of [[January]] [[1986]]. This story is split into three chapters: "The Terrible Machine," "The Discovery," and "The Battle."

==Plot summary==
Aliens invade [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and capture [[foonar]]s to use for harvesting the moon's trees.

{{Plot|comic}}
